task:
[Read from: /home/adnan/Projects/Inventory-Flow/plan.md, /home/adnan/Projects/Inventory-Flow/progress.md]

Perform an adversarial frontend review of the current uncommitted authentication implementation against the approved P0 scope. Inspect the actual git diff and all new auth/router/API/Topbar files. Do not edit files. Focus on route-guard/session bootstrap behavior, React lifecycle/races, browser Axios/cookie semantics, refresh single-flight/retry loops, state/cache cleanup, accessibility, API contract alignment, error handling, and security. Return only evidence-backed findings with severity, file/line references, and smallest safe remediation. State explicitly if no blocking issues.

## Acceptance Contract
Acceptance level: attested
Completion is not accepted from prose alone. End with a structured acceptance report.

Criteria:
- criterion-1: Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable

Required evidence: review-findings, residual-risks

Finish with a fenced JSON block tagged `acceptance-report` in this shape:
Use empty arrays when no items apply; array fields contain strings unless object entries are shown.
`criteriaSatisfied[].status` must be exactly one of: satisfied, not-satisfied, not-applicable.
`commandsRun[].result` must be exactly one of: passed, failed, not-run.
`manualNotes` and `notes` are optional strings; an empty string means no note and does not satisfy `manual-notes` evidence.
```acceptance-report
{
  "criteriaSatisfied": [
    {
      "id": "criterion-1",
      "status": "satisfied",
      "evidence": "specific proof"
    }
  ],
  "changedFiles": [
    "src/file.ts"
  ],
  "testsAddedOrUpdated": [
    "test/file.test.ts"
  ],
  "commandsRun": [
    {
      "command": "command",
      "result": "passed",
      "summary": "short result"
    }
  ],
  "validationOutput": [
    "validation output or concise summary"
  ],
  "residualRisks": [
    "none"
  ],
  "noStagedFiles": true,
  "diffSummary": "short description of the diff",
  "reviewFindings": [
    "blocker: file.ts:12 - issue found, or no blockers"
  ],
  "manualNotes": "anything else the parent should know"
}
```

criteria.must: Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable

commandsRun.command: cd frontend && bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run build
commandsRun.summary: Typecheck, lint, and production build passed.
Build succeeded with 0 warnings and 0 errors.
6 unit and 2 existing integration tests passed; no authentication endpoint tests were present.

validationOutput: Backend build and existing tests passed.
residualRisks: Credentialed SPA authentication is blocked from a clean checkout by the uncommitted/ignored development CORS origin.
Logout can be superseded in client memory by an already-running refresh response.
Refresh replay and concurrent rotation behavior lack endpoint-level relational integration coverage.
childReport.diffSummary: Authentication API, refresh-cookie session flow, route guards, forms, Axios recovery, and Topbar logout were added; required browser CORS and auth integration-test work is incomplete.
reviewFindings: blocker/high: backend/src/InventoryFlow.Api/appsettings.json:3-5 and backend/src/InventoryFlow.Api/Program.cs:34-41 - committed CORS origins are empty, so the credentialed SPA cannot call the API on a clean checkout.

blocker/high: backend/tests/InventoryFlow.IntegrationTests/InventoryFlow.IntegrationTests.csproj:8-15 and backend/tests/InventoryFlow.IntegrationTests/Api/InventoryFlowApiFactory.cs:25-33 - required authentication endpoint, replay, concurrency, and cookie tests are absent.
medium: frontend/src/features/auth/auth-api.ts:24-27 - getCurrentUser omits the bearer required by backend/src/InventoryFlow.Api/Controllers/AuthController.cs:63-72.
medium: frontend/src/lib/api-client.ts:19-24 and frontend/src/components/layout/Topbar.tsx:41-47 - stale refresh completion can restore state after logout.
low: frontend/src/features/auth/components/RequireAuth.tsx:15 - return state loses query and fragment.
low: frontend/src/features/auth/pages/LoginPage.tsx:62 and frontend/src/features/auth/pages/RegisterPage.tsx:71 - dynamic errors lack announcement and field association.
childReport.manualNotes: No files were edited during this review.
